title: Optimizing Edge Computer Vision Pipelines with TensorRT
description: A technical deep dive on porting PyTorch models, calibrating FP16 precision, and stabilizing execution loops under constrained GPU memory buffers.

title: Orchestrating Heterogeneous LLM Clusters: A Resilient Policy Engine Approach
description: A research article discussing resource allocation, workload scheduling, and multi-objective policy engines for LLM inference on mixed compute systems.

title: Deterministic Workspace Provisioning
description: Infrastructure-as-code configuration pipelines for lightweight, reproducible Arch Linux desktop workstations using shell automation and Podman containers.

title: Smart Agri Four-Legged Bot (SAFL-B)
description: A precision agriculture quadruped wheeled rover featuring real-time TensorRT weed detection, FEA structural validation, and multi-sensor telemetry.
